codeSystems.name: EndpointPayloadTypeCS
codeSystems.title: Endpoint Payload Types Code System
codeSystems.description: Endpoint Payload Types are constrained to NA (Not Applicable) as part of this IG

codeSystems.name: MtlsObjectCodeCS
codeSystems.title: mTLS Object Type Code
codeSystems.description: Codes for the Signed Object Types

codeSystems.name: OrgTypeCS
codeSystems.title: Organization Type
codeSystems.description: Categories of organizations based on criteria in provider directories.

codeSystems.name: PDexAdjudicationDiscriminator
codeSystems.title: PDex Adjudication Discriminator
codeSystems.description: Used as the discriminator for the data elements in adjudication and item.adjudication

codeSystems.name: PDexIdentifierType
codeSystems.title: PDex Identifier Type
codeSystems.description: Identifier Type codes that extend those defined in http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v2-0203 to define the type of identifier payers and providers assign to claims and patients

codeSystems.name: PDexPayerAdjudicationStatus
codeSystems.title: PDex Payer Adjudication Status
codeSystems.description: Describes the various status fields used when payers adjudicate a claim, such as whether the claim was adjudicated in or out of network, if the provider was contracted or non-contracted for the service

codeSystems.name: PDexSupportingInfoTypeCS
codeSystems.title: PDex Supporting Info Type
codeSystems.description: Claim Information Category - Used as the discriminator for supportingInfo

codeSystems.name: PdexMemberAttributionCS
codeSystems.title: PDex Provider Access API Attribution Code System
codeSystems.description: Code set to identify group resources from a Member Attribution Process that is used by Provider Access API.

codeSystems.name: PdexMultiMemberMatchResultCS
codeSystems.title: PDex Multi-Member Match Result Code System
codeSystems.description: Code set to describe the results group from a multi-member Match operation

codeSystems.name: PriorAuthorizationValueCodes
codeSystems.title: Prior Authorization Values
codeSystems.description: Codes used to define Prior Authorization categories

codeSystems.name: ProvenanceAgentRoleType
codeSystems.title: Provenance Roles
codeSystems.description: CodeSystem for types of role relating to the creation or communication of referenced resources

codeSystems.name: ProvenancePayerDataSource
codeSystems.title: Provenance Payer Data Source Format
codeSystems.description: CodeSystem for source formats that identify what non-FHIR source was used to create FHIR record(s)

codeSystems.name: OptOutReasonCodeSystem
codeSystems.title: Opt-Out Reason
codeSystems.description: Reasons for opting out of data sharing

codeSystems.name: OptOutScopeCodeSystem
codeSystems.title: Opt-Out Scope
codeSystems.description: The scope of a member's opt-out election

codeSystems.name: PDexConsentApiPurposeCS
codeSystems.title: PDex Consent API Purpose
codeSystems.description: Codes identifying which CMS-mandated API a Consent resource applies to. Used as a category discriminator to allow systems to locate and distinguish Consent records for Provider Access, Payer-to-Payer, and Patient Access APIs for a given member.

codeSystems.name: PDexMemberCharacteristicCode
codeSystems.title: PDex Member Characteristic Code
codeSystems.description: Codes for member characteristics in PDex groups

codeSystems.name: TreatmentRelationshipTypeCodeSystem
codeSystems.title: Treatment Relationship Type
codeSystems.description: Types of treatment relationships between members and providers
